mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, position, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks
title ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY position
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, due_date = #{dueDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tasks SET position = #{position}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, status, priority, due_date, position) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{dueDate}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position), 0) + 1 FROM tasks) )
